entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00598) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: CONTRACT MODIFICATION FOR A TECHNICAL INSERTION (TI), P00598, TO ADD COMPUTER HARDWARE EQUIPMENT TO THE CONTRACT'S PRODUCT BASELINE UNDER YEAR 7 PRICING AND OPTION PERIODS 7.3.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
